title: Blend Train
description: A phonics build game where kids couple onset and rime train cars to hear a word blend.
learningGoals: Hear how sound parts combine into CVC words
Use tap-tap or drag placement to build words without required reading
interactionModel: build-assemble drag or tap-tap sound cars into track positions
feedbackModel: Correct cars pop, sparkle, and speak their sound; misses wiggle gently with a spoken nudge and retry. Finished trains speak the slow blend and word.

modes.title: Couple the Cars
modes.skill: onset-rime blending with two sound parts

modes.title: Three-Car Trains
modes.skill: onset-rime blending connected to a whole-word card

credits: Kaigani; shared QLOBE Kids letter-tile art and placeholder text cards. Built with Codex for QLOBE Kids.
